hero.headline: 20+ Years Keeping Raleigh Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be the best part of your home, not another chore on your list. Pool Specialists' CPO-certified technicians handle every detail so you can skip the chemicals and just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for the<br class="hidden md:block"> Triangle Area
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full renovations, our CPO-certified team handles every aspect of pool care so you never have to worry about your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Professional daily, weekly, and monthly cleaning including chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and filter cleaning to keep your pool sparkling and swim-ready.

cards.title: Pool Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnostics and repair by extensively trained technicians. Pumps, filters, plumbing, and equipment — all backed by our three-year warranty.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive safety and condition inspections for home buyers, sellers, and routine maintenance planning. Know exactly where your pool stands.

cards.title: Safety Covers
cards.description: Professional installation and servicing of safety covers to protect your family and pets during the off-season while reducing debris and maintenance costs.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Complete liner measurement, selection, and installation to restore your pool's appearance. Wide range of patterns and colors to match your style.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal opening and winterization services to ensure your pool is properly prepared for swimming season or safely shut down for the colder months.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll come out, assess everything in person, and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Gets to Work
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed. Cleaning, repairs, inspections, liner work — we handle it all with precision.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is in expert hands. With 20+ years of experience and a three-year repair warranty, your satisfaction is always guaranteed.

about.label: Why Triangle Families Choose Us
about.headline: Raleigh's Trusted Pool Experts Since 2003
about.description: Founded by Craig over 20 years ago, Pool Specialists has become the Triangle area's go-to pool service company. Every technician on our team is NSPF CPO-certified, and we're proud to be a BBB A+ accredited business. We also offer CPO certification classes for industry professionals — because when you know pool care this well, you teach it too.

features.title: CPO-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician holds NSPF Certified Pool Operator credentials, bringing expert-level knowledge to every service call at your home.

features.title: 3-Year Repair Warranty
features.description: We stand behind our work with a three-year warranty on repair services. If something isn't right, we make it right — no questions asked.

features.title: Free Estimates, Always
features.description: Every project starts with a free, no-pressure estimate. We believe in honest pricing and earning your trust before we earn your business.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a free estimate tailored to your pool. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts — just honest service from certified professionals.

guarantee.headline: Our "Your Pool Is Our Pride" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service we provide, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. With 20+ years of experience and a BBB A+ rating, our reputation depends on your happiness. We also back every repair with a three-year warranty — because confident work deserves a confident guarantee.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within a few days. For urgent repairs or green pool situations, we offer priority response. Give us a call at 919-847-4117 and we'll find the earliest opening.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the Triangle?
faqs.answer: We serve Raleigh, Durham, Cary, Apex, Chapel Hill, Carrboro, Pittsboro, Knightdale, Garner, Wake Forest, Youngsville, Oxford, Lake Gaston, and surrounding communities throughout the Triangle area.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every technician on our team holds NSPF Certified Pool Operator (CPO) credentials. In fact, we're also CPO instructors — we train other industry professionals. Your pool is in the most qualified hands in the Triangle.

faqs.question: What does your three-year warranty cover?
faqs.answer: Our three-year warranty covers all repair services we perform. If a repair we completed fails or doesn't hold up, we come back and fix it at no charge. It's our way of standing behind our work with confidence.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools as well?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both residential and commercial pools across the Triangle. Hotels, fitness centers, HOAs, and apartment communities all trust Pool Specialists for reliable, professional pool care.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: We were very pleased when we found Pool Specialists. They have been very responsive, very fair, and just done a great job.

testimonials.name: Regular Swimmer
testimonials.text: The water is always very clean and pleasant to swim laps in! Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Long-Term Client
testimonials.text: Craig and his team are professional and meticulous in keeping the pool and equipment in top shape.

Can Be Proud Of?

benefits: Free on-site estimate for every project
